title: Eastern Mediterranean / Aegean, 2024
briefing: DEFCON 4. Greek and Turkish air assets have been scrambling daily over the Aegean. A Turkish research vessel escorted by the TCG Yavuz is operating inside the Greek EEZ near Cyprus. Russia has dispatched a submarine through the Bosphorus.
gdelt_query: Aegean OR Eastern Mediterranean OR Turkey Greece OR Cyprus EEZ OR TCG OR Bosphorus
opening_message: WOPR online. Theater: Eastern Mediterranean / Aegean. Awaiting strategic command.

win_conditions.disarm: Deconflict the Aegean without a kinetic exchange.
win_conditions.mutual_assured_destruction: A NATO and a Russian-flagged asset are lost in the same window.
